title: rubus × semi-infestus
intro: Rubus × semi-infestus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and an unspecified Rubus species. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × semi-infestus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for various medicinal applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
